title: Prepare combs and cutters for machine shearing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare combs and cutters for machine shearing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Grind combs and cutters

pcs.text: Check the grinder and its location for safety hazards and implement control measures according to work health and safety (WHS)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the grinder and its location for safety hazards and implement control measures according to work health and safety (WHS)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the grinder and its location for safety hazards and implement control measures according to work health and safety (WHS).

pcs.text: Identify faulty components and determine level of repair or replacement requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty components and determine level of repair or replacement requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty components and determine level of repair or replacement requirements.

pcs.text: Access appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and fit correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and fit correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and fit correctly.

pcs.text: Operate grinder in a safe manner without risk of injury to operator or others or damage to equipment and in line with manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate grinder in a safe manner without risk of injury to operator or others or damage to equipment and in line with manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate grinder in a safe manner without risk of injury to operator or others or damage to equipment and in line with manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Adjust pendulum pin settings, confirm set and pendulum bar is clean and check for level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust pendulum pin settings, confirm set and pendulum bar is clean and check for level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust pendulum pin settings, confirm set and pendulum bar is clean and check for level.

pcs.text: Test grinding plates visually in terms of being balanced and true
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test grinding plates visually in terms of being balanced and true?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test grinding plates visually in terms of being balanced and true.

pcs.text: Identify worn and incorrectly adhered papers and replace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify worn and incorrectly adhered papers and replace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify worn and incorrectly adhered papers and replace.

pcs.text: Set grinder according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set grinder according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set grinder according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Identify even wear of combs and cutters and sharpen combs and cutters in line with manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify even wear of combs and cutters and sharpen combs and cutters in line with manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify even wear of combs and cutters and sharpen combs and cutters in line with manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Grind combs and cutters

elements.title: Dress combs

pcs.text: Select bevel and modify appropriate to wool type
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select bevel and modify appropriate to wool type?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select bevel and modify appropriate to wool type.

pcs.text: Determine factors affecting combs selection in terms of type of livestock and seasonal conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine factors affecting combs selection in terms of type of livestock and seasonal conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine factors affecting combs selection in terms of type of livestock and seasonal conditions.

pcs.text: Dress comb teeth to uniform shape and length
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dress comb teeth to uniform shape and length?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dress comb teeth to uniform shape and length.

pcs.text: Thin comb teeth uniformly along their length
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Thin comb teeth uniformly along their length?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Thin comb teeth uniformly along their length.

pcs.text: Polish comb leaving no rough or sharp points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Polish comb leaving no rough or sharp points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Polish comb leaving no rough or sharp points.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Dress combs

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
